hypothesis: If molecular generation is guided by concept-based activation steering vectors derived from a frozen LLM's hidden representations via a Concept Bottleneck Model, then the resulting molecules will more accurately satisfy target physicochemical property constraints compared to vanilla LLMs and alternative steering methods, because the orthogonally-constrained property-specific embedding vectors enable precise, disentangled control over the LLM's generative process without requiring full parameter fine-tuning.
